message:
docs: add comprehensive CHANGELOG.md documenting project history

Auto-generated changelog covering the full commit history with
categorized entries for features, fixes, refactors, and chores.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,116 @@
+# Changelog
+
+All notable changes to **franken-agent-detection** are documented here.
+
+Format: [Keep a Changelog](https://keepachangelog.com/en/1.1.0/) with live commit links.
+Versioning: [Semantic Versioning](https://semver.org/spec/v2.0.0.html).
+
+Repository: <https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/franken_agent_detection>
+Crate: <https://crates.io/crates/franken-agent-detection>
+
+> **Release vs. tag:** Both v0.1.1 and v0.1.2 are git tags published to crates.io.
+> No formal GitHub Releases exist as of 2026-03-21.
+
+---
+
+## [Unreleased] — since v0.1.2
+
+Work on `main` after the v0.1.2 tag (2026-03-02). Not yet published to crates.io.
+
+### Added
+
+- **Copilot CLI connector** (`copilot_cli.rs`) — discovers and parses `gh copilot` JSONL event logs, separate from the VS Code Copilot Chat connector ([ae68b95](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/franken_agent_detection/commit/ae68b95a3cfd6bcf9a115fb03771ae309876f0e6), [fd25ae9](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/franken_agent_detection/commit/fd25ae9d6699df6db82ecee47a1764b7db404f99))
+- **Kimi Code connector** (`kimi.rs`) — Moonshot AI agent; parses JSONL `wire.jsonl` files from `~/.kimi/sessions/` with TurnBegin, ContentPart, and ToolCall message types ([963a594](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/franken_agent_detection/commit/963a59465b8946da2f1822da6f5e9c780495db16))
+- **Qwen Code connector** (`qwen.rs`) — Alibaba agent; parses JSON session files from `~/.qwen/tmp/` with user/assistant message extraction ([963a594](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/franken_agent_detection/commit/963a59465b8946da2f1822da6f5e9c780495db16))
+- Additional detection helpers in connector utils ([228ed12](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/franken_agent_detection/commit/228ed122fb001089fb65052d91de838089fc5dd9))
+
+### Fixed
+
+- **Amp connector** — extract workspace from `env.initial.trees[].uri` and timestamps from `"created"` field; filter out non-file URI schemes (`ssh://`, `https://`, `vscode-remote://`); improve cache root discovery with existence checks and fallback chain ([102b46b](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/franken_agent_detection/commit/102b46b597499f880418c99cfa00114f220cf5bc), [35e2a3a](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/franken_agent_detection/commit/35e2a3a100f2053d22f0253f06e76af1ac30076b), [3885140](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/franken_agent_detection/commit/38851402dfed74cfc4f42cdfc9a467a327601d10))
+- **OpenCode connector** — correct SQLite column names to `time_created`/`time_updated` (v1.2+ schema), fixing silent fallback to flat-file scanning ([73cf7af](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/franken_agent_detection/commit/73cf7afac555e755cddc3e116761cfc1c75f034f))
+- **Qwen connector** — normalize unknown message types to `"assistant"` for forward compatibility ([5b0eb1a](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/franken_agent_detection/commit/5b0eb1a7ece0c741f30b0e280d73488b8c4dd783))
+- **Kimi connector** — log JSONL line read errors via `tracing::debug` instead of panicking ([5b0eb1a](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/franken_agent_detection/commit/5b0eb1a7ece0c741f30b0e280d73488b8c4dd783))
+
+### Changed
+
+- Clippy and rustfmt cleanup across all connectors and `lib.rs`; no behavioral changes ([ba9e1c2](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/franken_agent_detection/commit/ba9e1c2aac9c0ff0fee35aec44eec8ba61a6083b))
+
+---
+
+## [0.1.2] — 2026-03-02
+
+Git tag: `v0.1.2`. Published to crates.io.
+
+### Added
+
+- **Continue connector** — `continue-dev` agent detection at `~/.continue/sessions` ([eeca45c](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/franken_agent_detection/commit/eeca45c086bdba2f4ffebb410517b8f2c3ab7e4f))
+- **Goose connector** — `goose-ai` agent detection at `~/.goose/sessions` ([eeca45c](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/franken_agent_detection/commit/eeca45c086bdba2f4ffebb410517b8f2c3ab7e4f))
+- `default_probe_paths_tilde()` public API — returns all known connector probe paths using `~/...` tilde notation for SSH probe scripts where the remote home directory is unknown at build time ([eeca45c](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/franken_agent_detection/commit/eeca45c086bdba2f4ffebb410517b8f2c3ab7e4f))
+- **OpenCode SQLite extraction** — OpenCode v1.2+ migrated to SQLite (`opencode.db`); connector now probes SQLite first (with `OPENCODE_SQLITE_DB` env override), then falls back to pre-v1.2 JSON files; deduplicates across both sources ([7c534b6](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/franken_agent_detection/commit/7c534b6087acc0ec3f0898c0d62ba6d07e202575))
+
+### Fixed
+
+- **OpenClaw connector** — use multi-agent detection in `detect()` instead of generic path probe, which could falsely report undetected when sessions exist ([6ae73d5](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/franken_agent_detection/commit/6ae73d5f78d2800b3fd1cadec27b0db43f483817))
+- **Pi-Agent connector** — accept sessions directory itself as a valid root in `scan_roots`, fixing silent skip of all sessions in watch/scan_roots code path ([b540606](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/franken_agent_detection/commit/b5406060c4219399ce36f77a250864f43f48e392); closes [coding_agent_session_search#85](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/coding_agent_session_search/issues/85))
+
+---
+
+## [0.1.1] — 2026-02-22
+
+Git tag: `v0.1.1`. First successful crates.io publish (v0.1.0 was rejected due to wildcard deps).
+
+### Added
+
+- **Connector infrastructure** — modular `src/connectors/` architecture with feature-gated dependencies (`connectors`, `chatgpt`, `cursor`, `all-connectors` feature groups) and shared `src/types.rs` definitions ([0bc91d6](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/franken_agent_detection/commit/0bc91d6f4b45a0664ead3eef0697955d199bfc1b))
+- **Shared utilities** — `path_trie.rs`, `scan.rs`, `utils.rs`, `workspace_cache.rs` providing common primitives for all connectors ([0bc91d6](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/franken_agent_detection/commit/0bc91d6f4b45a0664ead3eef0697955d199bfc1b))
+- **Token extraction module** — `token_extraction.rs` for agent session usage tracking and estimation ([7a731a0](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/franken_agent_detection/commit/7a731a000b3dfd6ac9212a587c9a793b26921aac))
+- **7 new connectors in detection registry** — aider, amp, chatgpt, clawdbot, openclaw, pi_agent, vibe added to `KNOWN_CONNECTORS` with alias resolution and cross-platform probe roots ([4ca7d98](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/franken_agent_detection/commit/4ca7d98a4c4adf03ac933a8c818ab9c1a84e5f9f))
+- **Env-override probe roots** — `CASS_AIDER_DATA_ROOT`, `CODEX_HOME`, `PI_CODING_AGENT_DIR` environment variables to redirect detection to custom data directories; `cwd_join()` for per-project marker detection ([a933965](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/franken_agent_detection/commit/a933965f48e94bef6d1c391c85d981850bbaead4))
+- **Aider connector** (`aider.rs`) — full session detection and parsing ([da0cd9d](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/franken_agent_detection/commit/da0cd9de368193d98f691ba653e3088ac91a2d1d))
+- **OpenClaw connector** (`openclaw.rs`) — JSONL session log ingestion at `~/.openclaw/agents/` ([2920985](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/franken_agent_detection/commit/292098525a12711108801213fac7a94fa42a875a))
+- **Claude Code connector** (`claude_code.rs`) — session parser migrated from `coding_agent_session_search` ([2d93ded](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/franken_agent_detection/commit/2d93dede03f909386b5b8a72b2a1366a9945ce73))
+- **5 batch connectors** — Amp (Sourcegraph), Cline/Roo-Cline (VS Code), Copilot Chat (VS Code), Factory Droid, Pi-Agent; full implementations with session parsing ([11bf51f](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/franken_agent_detection/commit/11bf51fce6cb345ddd2959a3cc5516945b9c5976))
+- **ChatGPT connector** (`chatgpt.rs`) — OpenAI ChatGPT conversation exports with tool use and image input support ([c5832f7](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/franken_agent_detection/commit/c5832f7d4956a14913508b46c3284236be6f5cb9))
+- **Codex, Cursor, and OpenCode connectors** with centralized `get_connector_factories()` registry; Cursor uses feature-gated `rusqlite` for `state.vscdb` parsing ([96d8014](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/franken_agent_detection/commit/96d80142872d38810587702ef12881674567a2d8))
+
+### Changed
+
+- Pinned all wildcard dependency versions to proper semver ranges (crates.io rejects wildcards) ([98f296c](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/franken_agent_detection/commit/98f296ca097085729642f7c234435bc5908b68d9))
+- Aider connector: clippy lints and idiomatic Rust improvements ([cb7bb8b](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/franken_agent_detection/commit/cb7bb8b1b3c901af97422f55bff54ea42b9af31c))
+- Gemini connector: simplified detection logic by removing redundant path probing in favor of shared helper ([c5832f7](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/franken_agent_detection/commit/c5832f7d4956a14913508b46c3284236be6f5cb9))
+- Narrowed codex probe from `.codex` to `.codex/sessions` and pi_agent from `.pi/agent` to `.pi/agent/sessions` to reduce false positives ([a933965](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/franken_agent_detection/commit/a933965f48e94bef6d1c391c85d981850bbaead4))
+
+---
+
+## [0.1.0] — 2026-02-15
+
+Git tag: none. Initial public release. Not published to crates.io (rejected due to wildcard deps; superseded by v0.1.1).
+
+### Added
+
+- Core detection API: `detect_installed_agents()`, `AgentDetectOptions`, `AgentDetectRootOverride`, `InstalledAgentDetectionReport`, `AgentDetectError` ([fa960bc](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/franken_agent_detection/commit/fa960bcdc294c9f7e16eafc5cbaf43b972c95eab))
+- Stable JSON-serializable report with `format_version` for downstream tooling and snapshot tests
+- Synchronous, runtime-neutral API (no tokio dependency)
+- Deterministic fixture mode via `root_overrides` for CI testing
+- Connector filtering via `only_connectors` with explicit `UnknownConnectors` errors
+- Canonical slug normalization (e.g., `claude-code` -> `claude`, `codex-cli` -> `codex`)
+- **9 initial connectors** in detection registry: claude, cline, codex, cursor, factory, gemini, github-copilot, opencode, windsurf
+- Cross-platform default probe roots (macOS `Library/Application Support`, Linux `~/.config` / `~/.local/share`, Windows `AppData/Roaming`)
+- CI workflow (GitHub Actions) and release workflow
+- MIT license
+
+---
+
+## Connector coverage timeline
+
+| Version | Connectors added | Cumulative total |
+|---------|-----------------|------------------|
+| 0.1.0 | claude, cline, codex, cursor, factory, gemini, github-copilot, opencode, windsurf | 9 |
+| 0.1.1 | aider, amp, chatgpt, clawdbot, openclaw, pi_agent, vibe | 16 |
+| 0.1.2 | continue, goose | 18 |
+| unreleased | copilot_cli, kimi, qwen | 21 |
+
+[Unreleased]: https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/franken_agent_detection/compare/v0.1.2...HEAD
+[0.1.2]: https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/franken_agent_detection/compare/v0.1.1...v0.1.2
+[0.1.1]: https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/franken_agent_detection/compare/fa960bcdc294c9f7e16eafc5cbaf43b972c95eab...v0.1.1
+[0.1.0]: https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/franken_agent_detection/commit/fa960bcdc294c9f7e16eafc5cbaf43b972c95eab
